thread_title: ✅「Answered」Please move the auto battle option to somewhere more deliberate

content:
Was testing some Resonance things in 24's Special Ops and came across this silly one. I almost feel bad reporting it cus it's so funny. Managed to recreate the bug repeatedly on different runs.

My theory is that when an Awakener is chosen in "Hypnotic Snake", their 4 primary Command cards are loaded into a part of the game's memory that contains Pickman's "Relic" Buff cards, allowing them to show up in the pool of options randomly.

I have not yet been able to Discover one of the Commands that had been recovered and engraved with Ensemble.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Discovering Dissociated Awakener Command cards with Lifelike Rendition

content: 在原神崩铁等强度膨胀后的游戏，这种孝子非常多，他们的核心逻辑是：“游戏资源获取失败 = 玩家个人技术/努力不足（'菜'），而非游戏机制变化（如强度膨胀）导致”。一个典型的因果倒置 + 个人归因谬误（fundamental attribution error），忽略客观系统因素，把结构性问题甩锅给个体
thread_title: 不抽sp墨菲是不配拿h4-10的300银芯成就奖励吗！

content: 简单分析一下，这个人大概就是中等水平自以为高手，看到吐槽就急： “我能过，你为啥不能？必是菜！”忽略自己用了多高的配置，他的配置要是真的低到能直接反驳我的观点，他直接就放图了，何必提出大佬能用四小强通关这种难度，游戏水平要真是高，为什么不自己试呢
